questions.prompt: A customer asks 'why was our nightly backup not produced last night?'. Which is the cleanest first read?
choices: Passwordless-login into PSE and dig through Maintenance logs.
Read the Cloud PBX detail in YCM for lastBackupTime; check the Task list for the scheduled backup task's last-run status.
Ring the customer back and ask them to check their email.
Restore the previous backup so they have something.
questions.explanation: Backup status records live in YCM (Cloud PBX detail, Task list, Repository). YCM is where the backup task runs from; PSE doesn't hold that schedule. Stay-in-YCM territory.

questions.prompt: Microsoft 365 integration (extension sync, SSO) is configured in YCM at the fleet level, so YCM is the right place to start triaging M365-integration tickets.
questions.explanation: M365 integration is configured per-PBX in PSE, not in YCM. YCM has no M365 surface. Setup is intermediate-course territory; permission and security pare-back is advanced-course territory. Don't search YCM for it.
